title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an end-to-end browser-based AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency across shots through storyboard mode, camera presets, and multi-shot generation. The tutorial demonstrates a complete 60-second short film workflow with built-in timeline editing and export.
